hero.title: ICT program structure.
hero.subtitle: The program develops technical capability, strategic vision, and ethical practice for real organizational environments.

step1.title: Objective
step1.body: Integrate and manage information and communications technologies to improve productivity and institutional outcomes.

step2.title: Graduate profile
step2.body: Network design and implementation, systems integration, and information-solution development for decision-making.

step3.title: Updated curriculum
step3.body: Specializations are periodically revised to remain technically relevant to evolving industry needs.

step4.title: Professional residency
step4.body: Connection with companies and organizations where learning is applied in real operational scenarios.

repos.title: Networks and communications
repos.body: Design, implementation, and management of computing and connectivity infrastructure

challenges.title: Software and architecture
challenges.body: Hardware, software, and technology-service integration for scalable solutions

codeReviews.title: Current technologies
codeReviews.body: Use of emerging tools with technical and methodological judgement

systems.title: Consulting and auditing
systems.body: Technical assessment and guidance to improve IT processes

collaboration.title: Complementary academic experience.
collaboration.body: The program includes academic, sports, and cultural activities plus industry visits to strengthen leadership, teamwork, and professional vision.

cta.title: Review projects, evidence, and lines of work.
